_note: Ballpark per-second USD rates used for the UI's cost ESTIMATES only — nothing here is billed. Verified against fal.ai's model pages (July 2026); edit freely when fal's prices move. Every figure the UI shows from these is labeled 'estimate'.

kling._source: fal.ai kling-video o3 STANDARD reference-to-video (July 2026): $0.112/s with audio, $0.084/s audio off — flat across durations, ~720p output (pro: 1080p at $0.14/s). Approve's Topaz upscale lifts the master to 1080p. Probe rides the same endpoint.

seedance._source: fal.ai bytedance/seedance-2.0/reference-to-video standard tier (July 2026): $0.014 per 1000 tokens for 480p/720p/1080p ($0.008/1k for 4k); tokens = height*width*seconds*24/1024 — so 720p=$0.3024/s, 1080p=$0.6804/s (fal quotes $0.682). Probe = SAME standard endpoint at probeResolution; the mini/fast tiers are deliberately not used (character fidelity drift).

topaz._source: fal.ai topaz/upscale/video ballpark per output second
